name: Slack
description: Slack workspace integration - send and receive messages via Slack bot
author: Agent Player Team

settingsUI.title: Slack Bot Configuration
settingsUI.description: Configure your Slack workspace bot connection

fields.name: bot_token
fields.label: Bot User OAuth Token
fields.helpText: Get from Slack App → OAuth & Permissions → Bot User OAuth Token

fields.name: signing_secret
fields.label: Signing Secret
fields.helpText: Found in Slack App → Basic Information → Signing Secret

fields.name: app_token
fields.label: App-Level Token (Optional)
fields.helpText: For Socket Mode - get from Basic Information → App-Level Tokens
